headline: GENERATIVE AI IS FAST BECOMING CONSUMERS' GO-TO SHOPPING ADVISOR
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a premier consumer financial services company, today announced key findings from its In Sync with Consumers survey, a quarterly series that provides insights on how Americans shop, spend, and access credit in an evolving retail landscape. headline: Trump says the U.S. is 'richer and stronger than ever'—why some Americans don't feel it
summary: President Donald Trump touted economic wins during his State of the Union address. But Americans and economists say affordability is still a major issue.
